author: inge broucke
titre: first and last experience ever with…
contenu:
first and last experience ever with Showroomprive.pt. I ordered and paid a twistshake bath. The bath comes on a support. the price mentioned was for the 2 pieces..
I only received 1 piece, ic the bath, but not the stand. Apparantly the stand was never handed over to the transport company. Now the problem is under investigation....and I will get refunded the stand in case I don t get it, they say... BUT what am I with the bath without the support stand ???
reponse_entreprise:
Bonjour Broucke,

Nous sommes navrés d’apprendre que votre commande n’ait pas été complète et vous présentons nos excuses pour cette expérience décevante.

En effet, le colis contenant le support de la baignoire a bien été remis au transporteur, mais le suivi n’a pas évolué, ce qui explique que vous ne l’ayez pas reçu. 

Le support manquant fait actuellement l’objet d’une enquête afin de déterminer ce qui s’est produit lors de l’expédition. Nous vous invitons à patienter : si le support ne vous parvient pas, le remboursement correspondant sera effectué.

Par ailleurs, si vous ne souhaitez pas conserver la baignoire, vous avez également la possibilité de la retourner pour un remboursement complet. Nous tenons à vous assurer que nous mettons tout en œuvre pour que le support vous soit livré dans les meilleurs délais.

Votre retour a été transmis aux équipes concernées afin d’améliorer le suivi des colis et éviter que ce type de situation ne se reproduise à l’avenir.

Cordialement,

Kanto

author: Jessica Blabla
contenu:
This is the worst service providor and customer service I could experience in my life. In total 3 orders lost, I haven't been informed by email of any anormal delay. No one is really following up, and the only answers you got from the customer service are templates. 
I used this plateform in another countries (France, Spain and Portugal) and never had any problem. But the dutch shop is better to avoid if you don't want to lose time waiting for an order you'll never receive. 
Within 1 year, I place 5 orders among them 3 have been lost.
At that moment I realised Showroomprivé is still using the same (unreliable) delivery providers, and I understand they don't care about improving there quality service. 
Thankfully, customers like me that care, can get satisfaction in concurrent plateforms such as Zalando lounge. 
I have nothing to gain in promoting another shop, but if you don't care about the customers, I do, and I hope it will help out some of us.
reponse_entreprise:
Bonjour Jessica,

Je vous présente mes sincères excuses au nom de Showroomprivé pour le désagrément rencontré.

nous vous assurons que nous travaillons constamment pour améliorer de plus en plus notre service !

À bientôt sur Showroomprivé !

author: Petite économiste
titre: I would give MINUS 1 if I could!
contenu:
I would give MINUS 1 if it would be possible! Be careful what you buy from this website. I shopped here many years with an on and off experience. Some, not all products, are good, price-wise and quality-wise. However, somehow the Client Service and the people handling the orders are absolutely unqualified to do their jobs! In 2020, let's recap:
- Returns take 1 MONTH and MORE!!
- I had an order of clothes that I returned and I have never seen my money back on it, despite the fact that I sent the information with the code number on it
- I have received orders where 1 article or more were missing! I had to email and they always asked if the pack was damaged which was not and I was even asked to sign a legal document that I did not receive the article while this has happened more than once!
- I received wrong orders (children clothes, wrong pants, wrong color of clothes, wrong size etc) and despite asking a refund of the postage fee (which is normal) I did not receive it
- I received clothes with cigarette burns on them!!! Go figure! Returned it but I was all the way nervous that they would blame it on me PLUS never received the money back on transport fee while I requested it by email!
- Now 2 last experiences which made me click off the website and never return: I returned two dresses on the same date, one was refunded the second was not ad I received it home with the package unopened,  exactly like I sent it. It is not sent too late, otherwise the other orders I sent back should have not been refunded!
- Last order that made me get out of the website: I ordered a set of glasses before Christmas, I received them broken, so I returned the pack. Today I received the pack back with the same glasses and I was not refunded! I was not late, I registered the return 2 days after I sent the pack and sent it max 4 days afterward and still they sent me back the pack (this time without enough padding in it while when I returned it I used padding to avoid further cracking). I was not even anounced by email about these packs. A total shame and lack of professionalism!

Conclusion? Do not trust this website, do not shop there if you do not want surprises! They lurk clients in with good discounts but they are NOT serious. Wait until you read what clients shopping for furniture really went through regarding refunds! I  will continue to shop on other websites, where maybe prices are a bit higher but they are professional.

contenu:

First I ordered some chairs that were meant to be delivered at my new home address, but with the covid pandemic I was unable to move home. After 3 or 4 phone calls with both Showroomprive and DHL no one can change the address.

So I reorder the same chairs - 4 chairs. 2 chairs arrive, 2 chairs don't. Customer support says they will reimburse me the value of the chairs that didn't arrive. So I am left with two mismatched chairs! And the reimbursement procedure involves me printing a form, filling it and sending it by email - during covid time when I'm quarantined at home without a printer! Ok, so they say I can just copy the form into a blank sheet and send it by email. But what if I want to give back the 2 mismatched chairs I have in my dining room? I'd have to put them back in the cardboard box I put out in the trash when I received them, or go out and buy a cardboard box to pack them! Ridiculous!

To sum up: I paid 680€ for chairs. I have 2 chairs! Beautiful!

Bonjour Isabelle, 

Je suis navré d'apprendre que vous ayez reçu votre commande défectueuse et tiens à vous présenter mes sincères excuses au nom de Showroomprivé pour cette déconvenue.

En effet, malgré les précautions prises lors de la préparation des colis, une anomalie au niveau du conditionnement ou de la livraison a dû se produire.

Tout d'abord, sachez que votre satisfaction est notre priorité et je vous présente nos sincères excuses pour cette situation.

Il s’agit d’une rupture de stock auprès de notre fournisseur. En effet, les marques nous réservent un stock défini et il peut arriver que des différences se produisent entre le stock initialement commandé et le stock réellement reçu, ce qui distingue nos ventes des ventes traditionnelles.

Je vous confirme que notre service a procédé au remboursement de l’article manquant.

Par ailleurs, votre retour a été remonté à nos équipes afin d’améliorer le suivi des stocks et la gestion des commandes.

Kanto

author: Reham ElShrabasy
titre: Poor Customer Service and Unreasonable Return Policies – Last Purchase with This Company
contenu:
This will be my last purchase with this company due to several issues with their customer service and return policies.

Firstly, the customer service team does not communicate in English, making it difficult for international customers to resolve concerns efficiently. Secondly, the return policies are unreasonable. I placed an order worth €150, which included a necklace pendant that was significantly smaller than advertised. When I requested a return, I was unaware that I needed to explicitly state that the item was "not as described" for a return to be covered by the company.

According to their policy:

1. Satisfied or refunded returns – The customer must cover return shipping costs.

2. Returns for incorrect, defective, or damaged items – The company covers the return shipping.

While this policy may seem clear, it is highly restrictive in practice. To my surprise, the return shipping cost for a small item was €7, which is excessive. Competing platforms like Zalando and Shein offer a far better experience, providing free returns regardless of item size.

Additionally, on a different item from the same list when I reached out to the original seller on the platform for an alternative solution on a missing part, they failed to respond after two emails and a follow-up. This lack of accountability reflects poorly on the company’s overall reliability.

Given this experience, I find the platform’s practices unfair and inconvenient. I have already deleted their app and will not be making any future purchases. Improvements in customer service, fairer return policies, and better seller accountability are essential for a trustworthy shopping experience.
reponse_entreprise:
Hello Reham,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you experienced with both our customer service and return policies.

Regarding customer service, I would like to clarify that our support is primarily focused on Spain, as we only conduct sales within the country. However, if you had requested a call with someone who speaks English, our responsible team member would have been happy to assist you.

I have reviewed the return request you submitted and noticed that you selected "I am disappointed with the quality of the product" as the reason for the return. Please note that this type of return is at the customer's expense. The correct reason for this case would have been "the description does not match," as this would be our mistake, and in that case, we would cover the return costs.

To ensure you don’t leave with a negative impression of our website, I have proceeded to approve a refund for the return shipping cost of €6.99. You should receive the refund within five business days, credited to the same payment method you used.

I hope to have the opportunity to serve you again as a customer and that this experience will not affect your trust in us.

Kind regards,
Maria

author: Terese Garel Bernard
contenu:
Quick efficient delivery and products always arrive well wrapped.
However, delivery charges very expensive which adds to the price of the product.
So a polo 20 euros becomes 25 euros and sometimes free delivery sites offer sale prices and have more choices in size and colours.
However, I realize that the seller charges for delivery and that this is not controlled by Showroom.
reponse_entreprise:
Bonjour Terese,

Je vous remercie d'avoir pris le temps de nous faire part de vos remarques.

Je vous informe que les frais de livraison sont directement fixés par les transporteur et varient selon le poids, le volume, la fragilité et le pays de destination du colis.
	
Ils varient aussi selon le mode de livraison choisi : à votre domicile ou dans un point de retrait.

Néanmoins, nous veillons à toujours les rendre les plus bas possibles. 

Je vous remercie pour votre compréhension et à très bientôt sur Showroomprive.com !

Arimbola
